name_en: Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
name_cn:
Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
Iconic rattan pattern, classic letter charm
Distinctive bow design paired with soft sheepskin
Elegant and stylish, the highlight is the exquisite bow chain
Making the whole bag more refined, with multiple interior pockets and card slots. Beautiful yet highly practical
size: 21*11.5*7cm
5840
